form.label: Findings And HITL
form.description: Rule findings and human-in-the-loop approval signals for demo workflows in local Splunk.

search.query: `defenseclaw_demo_finding_events` | where ("$severity$"="*" OR severity="$severity$") AND ("$rule_id$"="*" OR rule_id="$rule_id$") | stats count as findings
`defenseclaw_demo_finding_events` | where severity="CRITICAL" OR severity="critical" OR severity="HIGH" OR severity="high" | stats count as critical_or_high
`defenseclaw_demo_hitl_events` | where like(action, "%requested%") OR decision="confirm" | stats count as hitl_requests
`defenseclaw_demo_hitl_events` | where like(action, "%denied%") OR decision="deny" | stats count as hitl_denials
`defenseclaw_demo_finding_events` | where ("$rule_id$"="*" OR rule_id="$rule_id$") | timechart span=15m count by severity limit=8 useother=t
`defenseclaw_demo_hitl_events` | timechart span=15m count by decision limit=8 useother=t

`defenseclaw_demo_finding_events` | where ("$severity$"="*" OR severity="$severity$") AND rule_id!="(none)" | stats count as findings values(severity) as severities values(connector) as connectors values(target) as targets by rule_id | sort - findings | head 20
`defenseclaw_demo_hitl_events` | table timestamp connector action decision severity run_id session_id target message | sort - timestamp | head 25

`defenseclaw_demo_finding_events` | where ("$severity$"="*" OR severity="$severity$") AND ("$rule_id$"="*" OR rule_id="$rule_id$") | table timestamp connector rule_id severity run_id session_id target message | sort - timestamp | head 50
